mapper.select: select id, admin_id, news_title, news_content, news_source_url, news_category, news_type, to_char(published_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as published_at, to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as created_datetime, to_char(updated_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as updated_datetime from tbl_news order by created_datetime desc
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_news ( admin_id, news_title, news_content, news_source_url, news_category, news_type, published_at ) values ( #{adminId}, #{newsTitle}, #{newsContent}, #{newsSourceUrl}, #{newsCategory}::news_category_type, #{newsType}::news_type, now() )
